title: Alkem Laboratories is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Alkem Laboratories is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Alkem Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alkem Laboratories:
Alkem Laboratories is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
